name: Ben Carson iPhone
subject: Let's chat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
body:
Peter,

My team just told me that we are about to cross 50,000 donors to
the Carson America Exploratory Committee. Incredible.

I have no idea who our 50,000th donor will be, but I've decided
that I'm going to personally call to express my gratitude, and
maybe talk a bit about 2016.

If you go to my website now and make a donation, our 50,000th
donor might be you.

Here's the link: www.bencarson.com/explore/landing/bd/page-hf.

Thank you for your continued support as I explore a run for
President, and perhaps I will get to speak with you very soon.

Your friend,

Ben
Sent from my iPhone

Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.bencarson.com/p/iss0dkA1Nr

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.bencarson.com/p/oss0dkA1Nr

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Terry Sullivan, Marcorubio.com
subject: Halfway there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41621554:16602636773:m:1:1349778030:80EC9BF44C5B2489D6CA37D38DDC0B01:r)
---
Dear Peter, In the past 24 hours, nearly 1,000 supporters have stepped up to help us reach the halfway mark on our goal for the New American Century Fund -- $50,000! [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41621555:16602636773:m:1:1349778030:80EC9BF44C5B2489D6CA37D38DDC0B01:r) We need your help to get the next $50,000. [_**Click here to give now to the Century Fund so we can spread Marco 's message far & wide.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41621556:16602636773:m:1:1349778030:80EC9BF44C5B2489D6CA37D38DDC0B01:r) We've reached our goal thanks to people who have given a little and some who have given a lot, so if you can only spare $5, let me tell you -- it makes a difference. Will you help us raise the next **$50,000** for the Century Fund faster than we raised the first? [_**Donate here.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41621556:16602636773:m:1:1349778030:80EC9BF44C5B2489D6CA37D38DDC0B01:r) Terry Sullivan Campaign Manager Marco Rubio for President

name: Team Marco
subject: We weren't going to send this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41630179:16608890019:m:1:1349778030:392FF7B964EE1BA63CC1EC0B2996D4A3:r)
---
#
Peter, We were making such good progress towards reaching our first fundraising goal for the Century Fund that we didn't think we needed to send another message. But the bad news is the donations slowed down. **The good news is there 's still time left.** [ **_Click here to donate now and give us the support we need to reach our goal._** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41630180:16608890019:m:1:1349778030:392FF7B964EE1BA63CC1EC0B2996D4A3:r) Reaching our full funding goal means we'll be able to tell the right voters about Marco's vision & plan for the New American Century. It's the fundamental message of our campaign so we have to get this right. We've had such strong momentum this week -- don't let us end it on a low note. Please, [give now. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41630180:16608890019:m:1:1349778030:392FF7B964EE1BA63CC1EC0B2996D4A3:r) Thanks! -Team Marco
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41630181:16608890019:m:1:1349778030:392FF7B964EE1BA63CC1EC0B2996D4A3:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41630182:16608890019:m:1:1349778030:392FF7B964EE1BA63CC1EC0B2996D4A3:r)

name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: Read This: Increase Prosperity, Not Taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[****](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI1MDM4NTIS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxODUxNzk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
**
**
****

Peter,

I just wanted you to see an op-ed that I wrote this week. It is essential that we focus on empowering the American taxpayer not the federal government. Please take a look and forward it to you friends and family.

Thanks,

Scott Walker

**Increase Prosperity, Not Taxes**
By: Governor Scott Walker

Thankfully, another Tax Day is behind us. But that doesn't change the fact that the tax burden on working Americans is far too high. The Tax Foundation reports that in 2015 Americans will collectively spend more on taxes than they will on food, clothing, and housing combined. We send trillions to Washington, DC, and what are we really getting in return?

As a County Executive, and then as Governor, I've seen first hand that the most efficient services are those that stay closest to the individual they are designed to serve. Most of us know we could do a better job deciding how to spend that money than bureaucrats in Washington. In our visits to New Hampshire over the last few months, that's a sentiment we've heard over and over. People are hungry for leaders who will reclaim power from Washington and put it back in the hands of the people, and that begins with letting Americans keep more of the money they earn.

Liberals, however, don't seem to get it. Hillary Clinton is visiting New Hampshire on her announcement tour and we can be sure she will push the same failed agenda she's pushed for decades: higher taxes to pay for a bigger, more intrusive federal government.

Another presidential hopeful, former Maryland Governor Martin O'Malley, was in New Hampshire recently and he's been openly advocating higher taxes. That's simply the wrong approach.

While I can't speak for former Secretary of State Clinton or Governor O'Malley, I have yet to meet anyone from New Hampshire who wants to send more of his or her paycheck to Washington.

Of course, in order to provide safety and security for our families, we have to fund our government. But is there anyone in America who thinks the federal government uses our money as responsibly and effectively as it should?

The fact is the federal government spends far too much, often on things that taxpayers neither want nor need. Just as bad, all too often politicians use the tax code to pick winners and losers. I believe our country would be better off with a simpler, smarter tax code that lets Americans keep more of what they earn.

As governor of Wisconsin, I'm proud that I've been able to lower taxes on working families. Overall, we've provided $2 billion in tax relief-through reductions in income taxes and property taxes. We also simplified things by eliminating an entire tax bracket. In 2014, the typical family saw $322 in tax relief.

Our state's economy has reaped the benefits. In 2010, the unemployment rate in Wisconsin was 9.2%. Today, it's 4.6% - far below the national average.

Conservatives know that leaving money in the hands of taxpayers not only gives them the freedom to make more decisions for themselves, but it also keeps more money in the local economy, spurring economic growth.

Liberals in Washington, DC, however, wrongly think that you boost the economy by spending more money in Washington. So it's little wonder that higher taxes are always at the top of their to-do lists.

One thing is certain: They have put Washington's economy on steroids. Last year, six of the top ten wealthiest counties in America, according to median income, were located around Washington, DC. But Americans in the rest of our nation have seen stagnant wages and are still waiting to feel a real economic recovery.

If we're going to improve the economy in our cities and towns and villages across America, we need to take the power out of Washington and return it to the states and the ultimately the people.

As I've traveled the country, I remind people that there's a reason we take a day off on the 4th of July and not on April 15th. That's because in America we celebrate our independence from the government, not our dependence on it.

With new leadership in the White House, we can keep that tradition alive. The next president will face many challenges, but in order to expand prosperity, opportunity, and freedom in this country, we must put power back in the hands of the American people. It's time to reclaim power for the taxpayers.

_**This Op-Ed was originally published in the**_ _**[New Hampshire Union Leader](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1MDM4NTIS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxODUxNzk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)****.**_
__
__
__
__
_**[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1MDM4NTIS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxODUxNzk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**_

**

****
**

Paid for by Our American Revival

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Our American Revival. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Our American Revival's online community. If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Our American Revival, click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=22503852&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQxODUxNzk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Republicans attack Social Security. SIGN to stop them:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| I challenge my opponents in this race for U.S. Senate to say: "I oppose raising the Social Security retirement age."Friend -- Republicans have a dangerous plan in 2016: **Reshape Social Security from its New Deal origins into a shadow of its former self.** How? Chris Christie, Marco Rubio, and other Republicans are proposing raising the retirement age. These vicious cuts to Social Security hit middle class folks the hardest. As the next United States Senator from Florida, I'll fight to preserve and protect Social Security. You have my word. **Today, I 'm challenging the Tea Party candidates who will enter the U.S. Senate race over the coming weeks to join me, and say: "I oppose raising the Social Security retirement age." If you agree, please sign my petition:** **[Sign my petition challenging my opponents to keep their hands off of the Social Security retirement age>> ](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27db/738133e4/398efe02/7f9b898b/1087582506/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/protect-social-security?sc=ema_2015-04-17_b1_pm_v3")** The Tea Party has manufactured a crisis in Social Security so they can push through radical reforms that a strong majority of Americans, both Democrats and Republicans, oppose. I want to ensure our kids and grandkids will have Social Security when they need it. And I would do that by adjusting the payroll cap to make sure everyone pays their fair share, not by raising the retirement age and cutting benefits. I challenge my opponents in this race for U.S. Senate to say clearly to all Floridians, "I oppose raising the Social Security retirement age." **[Click here to join me.](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27db/738133e4/398efe02/7f9b898b/1087582506/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/protect-social-security?sc=ema_2015-04-17_b1_pm_v3")** Thanks, Patrick Murphy | **[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?refcode=ema_2015-04-17_b1_pm_v3&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

name: Dennis Cheng, Hillary for America
subject: Own a piece of this campaign from the start
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Hillary for America | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1MDUyNDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxODY4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

We're not wasting a single minute getting this campaign off the ground and running. If you want to own a piece of this from the very beginning, **[donate today and become a Founding Donor](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI1MDUyNDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxODY4NjMyS0&mt=2&rj=NTQxODY4NjMyS0&rt=0)**.

I'm the finance director here at Hillary for America, so I'm going to be upfront and say it's a safe bet that when you hear from me it'll be about money.

But I can promise you this: I'll never ask you for something we don't need. And right now, we need a strong start to build the kind of campaign that we can be proud of -- one that fights for every American.

That simply doesn't happen without you.
**So there's my ask: Donate today and let's start this off right. Become a Founding Donor:** **[www.hillaryclinton.com/donate](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1MDUyNDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxODY4NjMyS0&mt=2&rj=NTQxODY4NjMyS0&rt=0)** I am so proud to be in this with you.

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI1MDUyNDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxODY4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
